meta.title: Slay the Spire 2 Guides, Cards, Relics and Tools
meta.description: A bilingual Slay the Spire 2 guide site with cards, relics, builds and practical tools.

home.title: Slay the Spire 2 guides, card database and build tools
home.description: Structured references for characters, cards, relics, events, archetypes and ascension planning.
home.cardsDescription: Start with a stable information architecture, then expand into card filters, relic lookup and build planning.
planningItems: Organize characters, cards, relics, events, archetypes and ascension routes for lookup, run review and build planning.
Current modules: establish a stable information architecture first, then expand card filtering, relic lookup and build simulation.
Class filters, language switching and card details respond instantly on the frontend, making the site useful as a second-screen reference during runs.
Start with lightweight calculation cards to support quick route decisions, with room to expand into interactive calculators later.
